title: DOE WGSL CSL Simulator Plan Artifact

sourceWgslPath.description: Optional path (relative to repo root or absolute) of a WGSL source file. When present, the governed lane runner (bench/runners/run_csl_governed_lane.py::materialize_plan) invokes doe-csl-bundle-emitter to regenerate layout.csl + pe_program.csl from this WGSL at compile-input staging time, bypassing the static `compile/<target>/` fixture copy. Lets Doe's WGSL→CSL emitter chain be the single source of truth for the target's CSL; any emitter fix propagates to the lane without per-fixture updates. Absent (default) keeps the prior static-copy behavior for compatibility with hand-authored fixtures like the Gemma-3 270M manifest smoke.

compileParams.description: Optional extra `--params key:value` bindings appended to the cslc command for this compileTarget. The default `width:{peGrid.width}` and `height:{peGrid.height}` bindings are always included; these entries extend (and may override) them. Used by kernels that declare additional top-level layout params — e.g., tiled_matmul needs `P:2,Mt:8,Kt:8,Nt:8` — so the governed plan stays the single source of truth for how each kernel is compiled.

compileBlockedReason.description: Typed fail-closed reason telling the SDK driver to skip cslc for this target because governed manifest compile-param projection proved the target shape cannot fit the current HostPlan grid/budget. The driver records a blocked compile target with this reason instead of hanging or surfacing a misleading SDK memory diagnostic.

hostIoLayout.description: Optional per-kernel host I/O layout directives. Same shape as csl-operation-graph.schema.json#hostIoLayout entries; embed.chunkedDispatch tells the Python host runner to iterate ceil(num_tokens / tokensPerChunk) launches and concatenate per-column slices across the hiddenShardCount axis of the PE grid. Kernels without a hostIoLayout use single-launch default dispatch.

compileTimeoutSeconds.description: Optional per-cslc target timeout used by the SDK driver. This bounds diagnostic compile hangs while preserving the plan as the source of truth for the timeout.
